creator: karels@freebsd.org
text: Thanks.  I haven't tested this patch, but I confirmed earlier today that adding -Wno-undefined-var-template to the C++ flags in SConstruct makes it compile at least.  Your change is more selective. btw,  FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE doesn't have Clang 5.0; I compiled with 4.0.  Does it fail with 6.0?
